text.title: WCAG 2.2 Compliance Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by observable signal to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: define scope before audit; partial scope produces partial conformance

branch.question: all 9 new SC covered in sc_results?

conclusion.verdict: extend audit to cover missing SC
overall conformance = partial or non-conformant; remediate findings
overall conformance = AA-2.2-conformant; add CI gate

text.example: scope_defined=true → coverage_complete=true → any_fail=true (2.5.8 partial) → conclusion focus-visible-non-obscured → overall partial; remediate compare-table checkbox.
